key_hits: All 11 classes captured with correct days, times, titles
Notes preserved (Embassy of India, Gabi, VIC Runners)
Q3.5-9B|t0.1|rep0.justification: Flawless transcription of the full schedule plus accurate color legend; the overlapping Monday 13:10 OSTEOPOROSIS slot is correctly included.

Q3.5-9B|t0.1|rep1.justification: Identical in content to rep0; complete and accurate schedule with correct color-coding legend.

Q3.5-9B|t0.1|rep2.justification: Complete and accurate schedule; legend table is rearranged but content (Blue=Yoga, Orange=Shaolin, Green=Fitness) is correct.

Q3.5-9B|t0.4|rep0.justification: Full and accurate schedule with correct color legend; only formatting differs (less padded table) from the t0.1 variants.

Q3.5-9B|t0.4|rep1.justification: Complete accurate schedule; legend adds a redundant 'Meaning' column that simply restates the category, harmless.

key_misses: Legend omits the color-to-category mapping (only lists category names Yoga/Shaolin/Fitness without colors)
Q3.5-9B|t0.4|rep2.justification: Schedule content is fully accurate, but the legend table is degraded — it lists only the category names without the corresponding colors, losing part of the legend information.

key_misses: Per-row Category column misassigns OSTEOPOROSIS Prevention to Fitness and PRANAYAMA to Yoga — categories not explicitly shown on the poster for those classes
hallucinations: Invented per-class Category assignments (OSTEOPOROSIS=Fitness, TAIJI=Shaolin, PRANAYAMA=Yoga) that are not visible on the poster
Q3.5-9B|t0.7|rep0.justification: Schedule transcription is accurate, but the added Category column fabricates category labels for classes whose color/category isn't clearly shown, and the redundant per-day legend table is noisy.

Q3.5-9B|t0.7|rep1.justification: Complete and accurate schedule with correct color legend; only the redundant 'Type' column in the legend is superfluous but harmless.

Q3.5-9B|t0.7|rep2.justification: Full accurate schedule with correct Blue=Yoga, Orange=Shaolin, Green=Fitness legend; legend Day column is blank but color/meaning mapping is right.

notes: Q3.5-9B is remarkably consistent on this image: 8 of 9 responses are essentially perfect transcriptions of the 11-class schedule with the correct color legend (the t0.1 reps are byte-for-byte identical in content). The only blemishes are t0.4|rep2 losing the legend's colors and t0.7|rep0 fabricating per-class Category labels for classes whose category is not explicitly depicted on the poster. Temperature had no effect on schedule accuracy.
